summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dancing Video Generator app. Frontend UI and file uploads work perfectly, but video generation fails due to Sora 2 integration issues. Backend /api/videos endpoint has timeout problems.

critical_bugs.issue: Endpoint times out after 30+ seconds, preventing video list retrieval and status polling
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks frontend from loading previous videos and checking generation status

critical_bugs.issue: Video generation returns no data - video_gen.text_to_video() returns None
critical_bugs.impact: All video generation requests fail with 'Video generation returned no data'

working_endpoints.status: Working - Successfully uploads images and audio files
Working - Accepts requests and initiates generation

ui_bugs.issue: Generating status animation not displaying during video generation
Clicking previous video items doesn't load video in preview section

working_features.status: Working perfectly - files upload and display with thumbnails
Working perfectly - accepts and validates text input
Working perfectly - enables/disables based on form state
Excellent neo-brutalist design with proper styling and colors

success_percentage.backend: 60% - Core uploads work, but video generation and listing fail
success_percentage.frontend: 85% - UI works excellently, minor issues with status display and video preview

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Sora 2 video generation integration - video_gen.text_to_video() returns None. Check EMERGENT_LLM_KEY validity and Sora 2 API configuration. Also fix /api/videos endpoint timeout issue affecting video list retrieval.
